subtitles.original: 誓いをさあ
subtitles.english: I make this vow...

subtitles.original: 君のため
subtitles.english: ...for you...

subtitles.original: 最期まで
subtitles.english: ...until the very end!

subtitles.original: 涙さえ力に変えてきっと 描いていた望む未来へ
subtitles.english: Turning even tears into strength, to the desired future we envisioned...

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: ...I will connect us!

subtitles.original: わー！
subtitles.english: Wow!

subtitles.original: ということで、聴いていただいてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: And with that, thank you very much for listening!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今日は、小悪魔衣装になって、魔法で召喚しちゃいました！
subtitles.english: Today, in this little devil outfit, I summoned her with magic!

subtitles.original: 召喚されちゃいました！こあずき！
subtitles.english: I've been summoned! Ko-AZKi!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということでね、皆さんもご存知だと思いますが、アニソン界のエース、
subtitles.english: Yes, and as I'm sure you all know, the ace of the anime song world...

subtitles.original: 鈴木このみさんに異世界転生してもらいました！
subtitles.english: ...Suzuki Konomi-san has reincarnated into this alternative world!

subtitles.original: 召喚されましたー！
subtitles.english: I have been summoned!

subtitles.original: 誕生日をね、今日はお祝いしたいなと思って、参りました。
subtitles.english: I came here today wanting to celebrate your birthday.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということでですね、一緒に歌った曲は、
subtitles.english: So, the song we just sang together was...

subtitles.original: 『Re:ゼロから始める異世界生活』第1期OPテーマ「Redo」でした！
subtitles.english: ..."Redo," the season 1 opening theme of Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-!

subtitles.original: いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How did you like it?

subtitles.original: ドキドキしたなー。
subtitles.english: My heart was pounding.

subtitles.original: いや、私もめっちゃドキドキした。
subtitles.english: Me too, my heart was beating so fast!

subtitles.original: なんか『Redo』を人と歌ったことがあんまりなくって、
subtitles.english: Actually, I haven't really sung "Redo" as a duet before,

subtitles.original: えー！
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: あんまり怖い顔をして歌ってないか、すごい心配です。
subtitles.english: so I was worried if I made a scary face while singing.

subtitles.original: 貴重な、貴重な経験、ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you for such a precious, precious experience.

subtitles.original: AZKiちと歌えて楽しかった！
subtitles.english: It was so fun singing with AZKi-chi!

subtitles.original: そう、AZKiちって呼んでくれてるんですよ、みんな！
subtitles.english: Yes, she calls me "AZKi-chi," everyone!

subtitles.original: AZKiはね、このみんって呼んでるんですけど。
subtitles.english: And I call her "Konomin"!

subtitles.original: いや、実はね、出会いのキッカケはですね、
subtitles.english: Actually, the reason we met is...

subtitles.original: もうずっとAZKiは元々大好きなんですけど、
subtitles.english: Well, I've always loved Konomin's songs, but...

subtitles.original: このみんがね、あの、
subtitles.english: ...Konomin, you see...

subtitles.original: 『異世界かるてっと』の、
subtitles.english: ...for "Isekai Quartet"...

subtitles.original: そうそう、『異世界かるてっと３』のエンディングテーマ、
subtitles.english: That's right! The ending theme of "Isekai Quartet 3,"

subtitles.original: 「キミイロボクイロ」のカルテットバージョンを作ることになりまして、
subtitles.english: ...we were going to make a quartet version of "Kimiiro Bokuiro."

subtitles.original: そう！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: その時に会社の人から、
subtitles.english: And at that time, my staff said,

subtitles.original: 「誰か一人好きな人を召喚できる権利を差し上げます」って、
subtitles.english: "We will give you the right to summon one person you like,"

subtitles.original: 言われて。
subtitles.english: and...

subtitles.original: 「そんな機会あるなら、AZKiちにお願いしてみたい」と。私、ライブも元々観てたんで、
subtitles.english: "If there's such a chance, I want to ask AZKi-chi." Since I had already watched your live shows,

subtitles.original: えー！いいんですか？
subtitles.english: Oh my, really?

subtitles.original: いつかコラボしたいなって気持ちがずっとあったので、
subtitles.english: ...I had always wanted to collaborate with you someday.

subtitles.original: そこでラブコールをして、叶いまして。
subtitles.english: So I sent a love call and it came true!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: まさかね、そんなことがありまして、そこからコラボ配信とか、
subtitles.english: I can't believe it! That's how it started, and from there we did collab streams...

subtitles.original: あとAZKiもね、このみんのライブ観に行かせてもらったりとか、
subtitles.english: ...and I also went to see Konomin's live concerts, and...

subtitles.original: あとはね、ラーメンの、
subtitles.english: ...and then, ramen...

subtitles.original: ラーメンの汁をね、そう、飛ばしました。
subtitles.english: ...we splashed ramen broth, yes!

subtitles.original: 配信の日にそういう話をしていて、
subtitles.english: On the day of a stream, we talked about that,

subtitles.original: すぐLINEを交換して、
subtitles.english: and we immediately exchanged LINE contact info,

subtitles.original: すぐラーメンの汁を飛ばして、
subtitles.english: and went to splash ramen broth together! And then...

subtitles.original: すぐその後、焼肉にも行って、
subtitles.english: ...right after that, we also went to Yakiniku,

subtitles.original: 油を飛ばする！
subtitles.english: ...splashing grease!

subtitles.original: アフタヌーンティーにも行きました。
subtitles.english: We also went to afternoon tea.

subtitles.original: 一応オシャレなことも、そう、したい。
subtitles.english: We also wanted to do something fancy.

subtitles.original: 結構ね、よく会ってるよね、最近。
subtitles.english: We've been meeting up quite often recently.

subtitles.original: そうなんです、なんと、仲良くさせていただいております。
subtitles.english: Yes, we've gotten really close.

subtitles.original: 濃厚な付き合いで。
subtitles.english: A deep relationship!

subtitles.original: 濃厚な付き合いをさせていただいておりまして、
subtitles.english: Yes, we have a very close friendship going on,

subtitles.original: なんと今日、ついにバーチャル空間に来てくれました！
subtitles.english: ...and today, she finally came to the virtual space!

subtitles.original: 初めてです！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: This is my first time! Thank you!

subtitles.original: なんて楽しい空間なんだ！
subtitles.english: What a fun space this is!

subtitles.original: 嬉しすぎる！
subtitles.english: I'm so incredibly happy!

subtitles.original: なんか、この空間は魔法が使えるって聞いたんですけど、本当ですか？
subtitles.english: I heard that you can use magic in this space, is that true?

subtitles.original: 使っちゃいますか？このみんは一体どんな魔法を？
subtitles.english: Shall we use it? What kind of magic do you have, Konomin?

subtitles.original: 私も魔王繋がりで、1つだけ魔法を覚えてきたんですよ！
subtitles.english: Well, in connection with the demon king, I've learned just one spell!

subtitles.original: なんと！この日のために？
subtitles.english: Wow! Especially for today?

subtitles.original: これだけ使える。これはでも、みんなと一緒じゃないと完成しない
subtitles.english: I can only use this one. But, this spell won't be complete without everyone...

subtitles.original: 魔法なんで、ぜひAZKiちへのラブを込めて、
subtitles.english: ...so with all your love for AZKi-chi,

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌って魔法を完成させてください！
subtitles.english: please sing along with me to complete the magic!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: One, two...

subtitles.original: Happy birthday to you,
subtitles.english: Happy birthday to you,

subtitles.original: Happy birthday to you,
subtitles.english: Happy birthday to you,

subtitles.original: Happy birthday dear AZKi-chi,
subtitles.english: Happy birthday dear AZKi-chi,

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Happy birthday to you.
subtitles.english: Happy birthday to you!

subtitles.original: AZKiち、仕上げをお願いします！
subtitles.english: AZKi-chi, please do the honors!

subtitles.original: 仕上げ？はい！ふー！
subtitles.english: The honors? Okay! *blows*

subtitles.original: このみんは、炎の使い手でした！
subtitles.english: Konomin was a fire user!

subtitles.original: おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: まさか歌までプレゼントしていただけるなんて、
subtitles.english: I can't believe you even gifted me a song.

subtitles.original: もう、ここで命尽きても。
subtitles.english: I could die happy right here...

subtitles.original: ダメですダメです！命尽きちゃダメなんです！
subtitles.english: No, no, no! You can't die!

subtitles.original: 実は、皆さん、今日重大告知と、
subtitles.english: Actually, everyone, today we have a major announcement and...

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Analysis & Translation for Video Segment (00:00 - 04:56)**

Right, let's dive into this! The user wants subtitles, and as an expert in this field, I can make sure we get them perfect. First, this "Redo" segment, from 00:00 to 00:19. I'm seeing AZKi and Suzuki Konomi belting out the climax. I remember the lyrics: "誓いをさあ君のため　最期まで" – the classic. I'm nailing down these timestamps. Starting with "ちー", that's 00:00.000. Alright, let's break this down further, line by line... 00:00.000 to 00:04.000 roughly translates to "I make this vow for you...", then 00:04.000 to 00:08.000, "...for you..." – I've got it locked down. Finally 00:08.000 to 00:11.200, is "...until the very end!", all good. Then the next line, from 00:11.200 to 00:16.800, is, "Turning even tears into strength, to the desired future we envisioned". And finally, "I will connect us" from 00:16.800 to 00:19.500. Perfect. The burning lyrics match!

Next, 00:19 to 00:34 – the instrumental finishes. Not much here, just a held pose. No CC, and no ghost subtitles to worry about. We move to the conversation, 00:34 to 00:44. The energy is there, so I'm catching the nuances: "Wow!" at 00:34.000 to 00:37.000, translated to "And with that, thank you very much for listening!" at 00:37.000 to 00:41.000, and finishing with "Thank you so much!" at 00:41.000 to 00:43.500.

Okay, let's pick up the conversation. 00:44.000 to 00:52.000 is where it's at. I can decipher this dialogue. "Today, in this little devil outfit, I summoned her with magic!" from 00:44.000 to 00:48.000. It's AZKi who is the 'magic-summoned' guest! Followed by "I've been summoned! Ko-AZKi!" from 00:48.000 to 00:51.000, and a grateful, "Thank you!" from 00:51.000 to 00:52.500.

Now, 00:52.500 to 01:04.000. I can parse this. "Yes, and as I'm sure you all know, the ace of the anime song world..." from 00:52.500 to 00:57.000, and "...Suzuki Konomi-san has reincarnated into this alternative world!" from 00:57.000 to 01:01.000. "I have been summoned!" is what's said at 01:01.000 to 01:04.000.

01:04.000 to 01:12.000 – Birthday wishes coming. "I came here today wanting to celebrate your birthday." from 01:04.000 to 01:07.500. "Thank you so much!" (again!) from 01:07.500 to 01:09.500, and once more from 01:09.500 to 01:12.000.

Now, we hit 01:12.000 to 01:22.000. They're telling us they sang "Redo" "So, the song we just sang together was..." from 01:12.000 to 01:16.000, ..."Redo," the season 1
